sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_reverse_utf8 (id UInt32, original_string String, reversed_string String);
INSERT INTO test_reverse_utf8 (id, original_string, reversed_string) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!', reverseUTF8('Hello, World!'));
UPDATE test_reverse_utf8 SET reversed_string = reverseUTF8(original_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_string, reversed_string FROM test_reverse_utf8 WHERE reversed_string = 'dlroW ,olleH';
SELECT id, reverseUTF8('1234') AS reversed_numeric_string FROM test_reverse_utf8;
